title: Ability to have satelite view map as a default
excerpt:
So the only way to see the map view as satelite is when it’s not docked. Plus, you can’t save it as a default. 
So having a way to make the satelite view as default plus the ability to dock it will be great. 
Thank you.

posts.author: Gal5252 (Gal)
posts.cookedHtml:
So the only way to see the map view as satelite is when it’s not docked. Plus, you can’t save it as a default.
So having a way to make the satelite view as default plus the ability to dock it will be great.
